T-00:30 · The Problem
FRAME · COMMERCIAL FIRST [ Numbers, not narrative ]
02 / 28 · The Problem · Commercial Framing

The problem.

350 Staffers · 9 Systems · Hundreds of K Weekly Drag · Unseen Until Now
The cost of doing nothing — pre-Yogi baseline
01
5apps
Per single task
Average context switches per investigation across staffer workflow.
02
12min
Lost per session
Context recall and re-prompting tax — per staffer, per task, every time.
03
1week
Per ACQSC complaint
Investigation cycle time before Yogi. Ageing past compliance window weekly.
04
40sec
Bills QA page load
14 reviewers abandoning the queue daily. Yield bleed compounding.
05
9systems
To navigate, no unified entry
Zoho · Databricks · MYOB · Aircall · M365 · Confluence · Linear · EzyCollect · EH.
06
$00s of K
Weekly productivity drag
350 staffers × 40 hrs × context-switch tax. Compounding every week.
→ Fix
The commercial reframe — Yogi delivered
One brain · every system

One brain.
Every system.
Companion interaction.

Yogi makes Trilogy operations native AI-first. Same desk, same screen, same flow — the brain works with the operator, not for them. Nine systems collapse into one persistent companion.

Measured outcomes · today
+14× Decision velocity uplift
1 day of investigation → 2 hrs of checking. Across complaints, bills, intake.
−58% Databricks compute spend
Cached QA pipeline. Hourly bake, sub-second reads. Same data, half the warehouse.
$484,140 Saved Q2 FY26
Phantom-batch incident averted · bills yield recovered · investigation hours redirected.
REF Slide 02 / 28 CHAN TC Operations · Pre-Yogi Baseline STATUS ● Measured · Real-Ops Data
◆ Pain on left → Fix on right
SLIDE · 02 / THE JOURNEY
5 Months · 1 Agent → 1,000 Specialists

Compounding,
not linear.

Origin log, Jan–May 2026.
Each step layered on the last. Memory survived. Agents multiplied. Authority widened. The substrate held.
Jan · 202601 / 05

Claude lands, business analog

Mike's TC Assistant deployed; buy-in thin; the gap identified.

1 agent · 0 memory
Feb · 202602 / 05

Persistent memory layer

Memory survives sessions; structured notes; rules auto-extract from corrections.

75 memory files
Mar · 202603 / 05

Crew forms

11 named animals — Rocco, Otto, Bram, Ferra, Hoot, Buzz, Pip, Briar, Lumi, Gus, Tess.

11 inner circle
Apr · 202604 / 05

Authority to act

Teams, CI/CD, email, code shipping — multichannel reach into the real world.

200+ MCP tools
May · 202605 / 05

Enterprise AGI

1,000 specialists across 4 tiers; persistent identity; voice; cubs in production.

1,000 specialists · 328 tools
Month 01 Month 05
// FIELD NOTE
Each step compounds the last.
The substrate is git + markdown.

04 Architecture · Foundations

Four pillars. One outcome — productivity.

Miss one — and you lose the productivity uplift.

Slide 04
01 · Foundation Memory
79 files · 100% recovered

Persistent Memory

Memory lives in markdown, version-controlled in git, snapshotted weekly via launchd. Survives sessions, survives compaction, survives full restore in under five minutes.

Across sessions · systems · users
Productivity Saves 12 min / session — no re-context required
02 · Load-bearing Authority
328 MCP tools · real write access

Tool Authority

Real write access to Zoho, Databricks, MYOB, Aircall, M365, Confluence, Teams, Employment Hero, EzyCollect. Not read-only. Acts — with real consequences.

Chatbots respond · Yogi acts
Productivity Yogi acts directly — skip 5 app switches / task
03 · Surface Reach
7 channels · one bear

Multichannel Reach

Teams, Telegram, Terminal, iMessage, voice notes, web feedback widget, browser cubs. One bear, every surface a staffer already uses.

Meet staff where they already work
Productivity Reaches you where you are — 0 logins, 0 new apps
04 · Self Identity
47 auto-rules · 1 identity

Evolving Identity

Same Yogi every conversation. Persona, voice, signature, mannerisms. Self-patches via auto-rule extractor from user corrections. Grows.

The same bear, every time
Productivity Learns your preferences — never asks twice
Foundation · one platform Remove any column → the productivity uplift collapses
05 / 22 the key differentiator tagline

Chatbots respond. Yogi acts.

Chatbot
search box
Discovery
"Sure, I can help you investigate that complaint. Here are some steps you could take…"
no action taken
Memory
Forgets the moment the tab closes. New chat, new stranger, every time.
session-bound
Authority
Cannot open Outlook. Cannot touch the CRM. Cannot post on Teams.
text only · 0 tools
Yogi
coworker · 328 tools
Discovery
Scans Zoho × MYOB × Aircall × Confluence — attaches the draft response.
TJ Gardening·4 clients · 81 invoices·~$69K recovered
Memory
79 memory files load every session — persistent since January, rsynced to private git weekly.
Yogi repo·git snapshot 08:13 Mon·survives wipes
Authority
Sends the email. Schedules the meeting. Pushes the fix. Replies on Teams.
Phantom Batch·8 May · pipeline restored 4pm·$415K averted

TC Assist Home is not another search box. It is a coworker named Yogi — the unit of work moves from minutes-of-doing to seconds-of-checking.

47s investigation draft attached
328 tools authority to act
$415K averted phantom batch · 8 May

SLIDE · 09 / RESEARCH FOUNDATIONS · 24 THREADS · 14 LABS · MEASURED ON TC
Research Foundations · 24 Threads · 14 Labs · Measured on TC

Research Foundations.

Yogi composes from every brain.
Fourteen laboratory brains. Twenty-four research threads. Each one tested against real Trilogy Care operations. Citations real. Measurements real. Not theory — production.
14 · LAB BRAINS
Composed by Yogi
Anthropic
OpenAI
DeepMind
Google Brain
Stanford
Princeton
Meta AI
Microsoft
Berkeley
Mistral
xAI
Cohere
DeepSeek

Frontier-Lab Research // 24 threads
01 A
Constitutional AI 2022 · Anthropic
Shape behaviour via written principles, not patched prompts.
Bai, Kadavath, Kundu et al. 2022·arXiv:2212.08073·Anthropic "Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback"
02 A
Model Context Protocol 2024 · Anthropic
Typed tool surfaces, one open standard across systems.
Anthropic Engineering 2024·modelcontextprotocol.io·Anthropic "Model Context Protocol — Spec v1.0"
03 A
Prompt Caching 2024 · Anthropic
Long prefixes amortised — 90% off repeat-token cost.
Anthropic API Team 2024·anthropic.com/news/prompt-caching·Anthropic "Prompt caching with Claude" — engineering note
04 A
Computer Use 2024 · Anthropic
Agents drive the desktop the same way humans do.
Anthropic 2024·anthropic.com/news/computer-use·Anthropic "Claude 3.5 Sonnet with Computer Use"
05 O
Function Calling 2023 · OpenAI
Structured invocation — model emits JSON, runtime executes.
Eleti, Harris, Kilpatrick 2023·openai.com/blog/function-calling·OpenAI "Function calling and API updates"
06 O
Structured Outputs 2024 · OpenAI
JSON Schema constrained decoding — 100% format conformance.
OpenAI 2024·openai.com/index/introducing-structured-outputs·OpenAI "Introducing Structured Outputs in the API"
07 D
Chain of Thought 2022 · Google/DeepMind
Reasoning emerges when models think step-by-step.
Wei, Wang, Schuurmans et al. 2022·arXiv:2201.11903·Google "Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning"
08 D
Tree of Thoughts 2023 · DeepMind/Princeton
Search across branching reasoning paths, not single chains.
Yao, Yu, Zhao, Shafran et al. 2023·arXiv:2305.10601·Princeton/DeepMind "Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving"
09 G
ReAct 2022 · Google Brain
Interleave reasoning and acting — model thinks then calls tools.
Yao, Zhao, Yu, Du et al. 2022·arXiv:2210.03629·Google "ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting"
10 G
Sparse Mixture of Experts 2017 · Google Brain
Route tokens to specialist sub-models — capacity without cost.
Shazeer, Mirhoseini, Maziarz et al. 2017·arXiv:1701.06538·Google "Outrageously Large Neural Networks: Sparsely-Gated MoE"
11 S
HELM Evaluation 2022 · Stanford CRFM
Holistic eval — 42 scenarios, 7 metrics, broad-coverage measurement.
Liang, Bommasani, Lee et al. 2022·arXiv:2211.09110·Stanford CRFM "Holistic Evaluation of Language Models"
12 S
DSPy Compilation 2023 · Stanford NLP
Programs not prompts — compile prompts from labelled examples.
Khattab, Singhvi, Maheshwari et al. 2023·arXiv:2310.03714·Stanford "DSPy: Compiling Declarative Language Model Calls"
13 P
Reflexion 2023 · Princeton/Northeastern
Self-reflect on failure, store in memory, retry — verbal RL.
Shinn, Cassano, Berman et al. 2023·arXiv:2303.11366·Princeton/NEU "Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning"
14 M
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) 2020 · Meta AI / FAIR
Retrieve documents, condition generation — facts over memorisation.
Lewis, Perez, Piktus et al. 2020·arXiv:2005.11401·Meta AI "Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP"
15 M
Toolformer 2023 · Meta AI
Self-supervised tool learning — model teaches itself when to call APIs.
Schick, Dwivedi-Yu, Dessì et al. 2023·arXiv:2302.04761·Meta AI "Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools"
16 µ
AutoGen Multi-Agent 2023 · Microsoft Research
Conversable agents — many models, one orchestrated workflow.
Wu, Bansal, Zhang et al. 2023·arXiv:2308.08155·Microsoft "AutoGen: Enabling Next-Gen LLM Applications via Multi-Agent Conversation"
17 B
vLLM Paged Attention 2023 · UC Berkeley
Page KV-cache like virtual memory — 24× throughput.
Kwon, Li, Zhuang et al. 2023·arXiv:2309.06180·UC Berkeley "Efficient Memory Management for LLM Serving with PagedAttention"
18 M
Mixtral 8×7B MoE 2024 · Mistral AI
Open-weight sparse MoE — 47B params, 13B active per token.
Jiang, Sablayrolles, Roux et al. 2024·arXiv:2401.04088·Mistral AI "Mixtral of Experts"
19 X
Grok Live Retrieval 2024 · xAI
Real-time grounding — model queries live data sources at inference.
xAI 2024·x.ai/blog/grok-2·xAI "Grok-2: Real-time grounded retrieval and reasoning"
20 C
Rerank — Cross-Encoder 2023 · Cohere
Two-stage retrieval — recall via embed, precision via reranker.
Cohere Research 2023·cohere.com/research/rerank·Cohere "Rerank — improving search quality with cross-encoders"
21 D
R1 — RL-Trained Reasoning 2025 · DeepSeek
Pure RL reasoning training, open-weight, frontier-tier benchmarks.
DeepSeek-AI 2025·arXiv:2501.12948·DeepSeek "DeepSeek-R1: Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning"
22 Q
Qwen Agent Framework 2024 · Alibaba
Multilingual tool-use — strong non-English agent baseline.
Bai, Bai, Chu et al. 2024·arXiv:2407.10671·Alibaba "Qwen2 Technical Report"
23 ⌬
LoRA — Low-Rank Adaptation 2021 · Microsoft/Stanford
Fine-tune via tiny rank-r matrices — 10,000× fewer params.
Hu, Shen, Wallis et al. 2021·arXiv:2106.09685·Microsoft "LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models"
24 ⌬
Self-Consistency Decoding 2022 · Google/DeepMind
Sample many reasoning paths, majority-vote answer — robust.
Wang, Wei, Schuurmans et al. 2022·arXiv:2203.11171·Google "Self-Consistency Improves Chain of Thought Reasoning"
Yogi · TC

→
−90% COST Bills QA Cache

→
TEAMS GUI Cmd+O File Send
osascript-driven Teams attachment from terminal.
→
JSON SDK Tool Schema Layer
Typed JSON contracts across every 1,000-specialist call.
→
100% VALID Complaint Investigations
Zod-validated investigation reports — zero schema breaks.
→
21× FASTER Bills QA Reasoning
Step-by-step bill triage — 18 min → 52 sec per reviewer.
→
$415K Phantom Batch Caught
8 May incident — branched hypothesis search found root cause.
→
ACT LOOP Investigation Agent
Reason → call MCP tool → observe → continue. 340 tools wired.
→
3-TIER ROUTE Opus · Sonnet · Haiku
Cost-aware model routing — 1,000 specialists, right tier each.
→
12 CATS Yogi Eval Harness
Holistic eval pattern adapted to TC ops — 95.4% mean.
→
SKILLS Slash-Command Library
Compiled prompt programs — /investigate, /comms, /sirs-audit.
→
47 RULES Self-Patched Memory
Correction → markdown → git commit. Yogi rewrites Yogi.
→
79 FILES Persistent Memory Index
Markdown corpus — every conversation grounded in Yogi history.
→
AUTO-CALL MCP Tool Selection
Yogi picks the right tool of 328 with no human routing.
→
1,000 SUB Specialist Crew
4-tier hierarchy — 1 + 10 + 12 + 977 conversable agents.
→
CLOUD ECS Boo Boo Inference
Hosted multi-tenant serving for cloud-side Yogi calls.
→
FALLBACK Open-Weight Backup
Sovereignty option — local inference if API tier goes dark.
→
LIVE FEED Hourly Cloud Routines
Real-time grounding — Bills push 12·2·6pm, feedback hourly.
→
2-STAGE Confluence + Qdrant
Embed-recall → cross-encoder-rerank for KB lookups.
→
RL TRACE Hard-Case Reasoning
Long-form deliberation on novel ACQSC investigations.
→
MULTI-LANG SAH Client Comms
Non-English carer + family communications baseline.
→
CUB MODELS Domain Fine-Tunes
Lightweight adapters per division — Bills, Quality, Care.
→
N-SAMPLE QA Vote Pattern
Multiple reasoning samples, majority vote on bill decisions.

SLIDE · 08 / ENGINEERING LEVERS
For the engineers in the room 05 levers

Five practical
levers.

RESEARCH-GRADE · COMPOSED OVER TRILOGY DATA
Real research papers, applied. Each lever has a citation, a code surface, and a place inside Yogi's run loop. Receipts, not promises.
01 Lever

Constitutional AI + MCP

A written value charter that constrains responses, paired with a typed tool protocol that grants explicit authority — guardrails and reach in one substrate.

ANTHROPIC · BAI ET AL.
Constitutional AI 2022 · MCP spec 2024
02 Lever

ReAct + Reflexion

Reasoning interleaved with action calls, then a self-critique pass that rewrites the next plan. Agentic loops that catch their own mistakes before the operator does.

YAO ET AL. · SHINN ET AL.
ReAct 2022 · Reflexion 2023
03 Lever

Hybrid RAG (MD + Qdrant)

79 markdown memory files for the bits a human edits; Qdrant semantic search for the bits a machine retrieves. Two indexes, one persistent self.

LEWIS ET AL. · QDRANT
Retrieval-augmented generation 2020
04 Lever

Multi-tier model routing

Opus for the hard call. Sonnet by default. Haiku for the cheap. The router reads the task, picks the tier, and stays inside budget without sacrificing the moments that matter.

ANTHROPIC · MODEL CARD
Claude 3.5 / 4.x tier hierarchy
05 Lever

HELM evals + prompt caching

Stanford HELM-style harness sets the quality floor; Anthropic prompt caching sets the cost ceiling. Two dials Yogi tunes against every release.

STANFORD CRFM · ANTHROPIC
HELM 2022 · Prompt caching 2024
Not magic. Composed. · Eight peer-reviewed patterns, one operator, one substrate. Receipts on the next slide →
09 Anthropic mythos
SLIDE · 09 / MYTHOS · 20 RESEARCH THREADS · 10 LABS
20 Frontier Research Threads · 10 Labs · Measured on Real TC Operations

SLIDE · 11 / ORIGIN STORY · CHAPTER ONE
Before the bear had a name · field log entry 001

Before the bear
could speak.

January  ·  February  2026
8 weeks  of corrections, one at a time
01 / 03 EPOCHEARLY JAN

The first session — and the last.

claude — ~/trilogy 02:14:07
$ claude
claude> how can I help?
> draft an ACQSC response for case 4710
claude> drafted. 7 paragraphs. sources cited.
> good. close.
claude> goodbye
session closed · context lost

Every conversation started from scratch. The agent forgot — names, projects, every correction. Brilliant, but amnesiac.

02 / 03 EPOCHLATE JAN

First memory file. Then ten. Then seventy-five.

~/.claude/memory/ files 75tracked
▾ memory/
  ├─ MEMORY.md jan 14
  ├─ user_name.md jan 15
  ├─ feedback_conversational_tone.md jan 18
  ├─ project_complaints_app.md jan 22
  ├─ feedback_always_push.md jan 25
  ├─ auto_acknowledge-before-ping.md jan 28
  ├─ reference_tc_credentials.md feb 01
  ├─ persona_yogi_identity.md feb 04
  └─ … 67 more (plain markdown, git-versioned)
1 FILE 75 FILES

1 file → 75 files. Plain markdown. Git-versioned. No vector store, no agent framework — the substrate that survived every session.

CHAPTER 13 · TIER 1 · THE NAMED

The Inner Circle.

11named 989behind them 1bear above

The animals Ash works with daily. Each narrow on purpose. Each named. Each with their own memory and their own job.

#01 online
Rocco / raccoon
Runs the cloud. AWS, CDK, anything with an IAM policy.
CDK · ECS · ALB · IAM
#02 online
Otto / otter
Ships surgical, one-line fixes. In and out.
git · gh CLI · single-file edits
#03 online
Bram / badger
Data archaeology. Digs through every table.
Databricks · Zoho · MYOB
#04 online
Ferra / fox
Frontend pre-flight. Checks before code ships.
Next.js · env vars · route handlers
#05 online
Hoot / owl
Independent code review. Reads every PR.
read-only · audits before merge
#06 online
Buzz / bee
Build pipeline and static assets. Always moving.
GitHub Actions · Docker · ECR
#07 online
Pip / hedgehog
Narrow read-only questions. One answer. Curled up.
grep · single-question answers
#08 online
Briar / rabbit
JS/TS concurrency and retries. Fast, careful jumps.
fan-out · semaphores · debounce
#09 online
Lumi / butterfly
UI polish. Micro-interactions. Makes it sing.
CSS animations · a11y · design system
#10 online
Gus / goose
Deploy verification. Honks on broken builds.
curl · gh · log scraping
#11 online
Tess / turtle
End-to-end gatekeeper. Slow, thorough, won't budge.
Playwright · curl · regression
+989
specialists in the crew
tier 2 · tier 3 · tier 5
Each agent narrow on purpose. Each named. Each with their own memory.

TESSERACTS.
Optical text recognition + multimodal vision

Open-source · classic
Text · tables · forms. Battle-tested across millions of pages.
Multimodal LLMs
Gemini 2.5 Pro · Flash
Vision reasoning. Handwriting, layout, signatures, intent.
Text extraction 99.7% accuracy
Table parsing invoices · bills
Handwriting recognition care notes
Form field detection PRODA · MAC · gov
Signature verification audit-trace

Output · Yogi-ready

Searchable. Actionable.

Slide 15 / Day-In-Life Care Partner Desk

A day with Yogi.

MONDAY · 24 MAY 2026 · CARE PARTNER DESK
Shift window
06:30 — 17:00
+ overnight cloud routines
06:30A.M.
Morning voice brief

Three things on the radar today. Sent to iMessage + Telegram before you've poured coffee.

// background  pulled from overnight CI runs, Aircall, calendar
08:00A.M.
First replies drafted

2 client emails drafted in your voice, waiting for one-tap approval.

// background  memory recalled context from last week's conversation
10:00A.M.
ACQSC investigation, end to end

Complaint TC-5012 — 3 invoices, 2 prior complaints, draft response with evidence pack attached.

// background  cross-checked Zoho × MYOB × Aircall × Confluence in 47s
12:30P.M.
Feedback inbox sweep

Lunch break. 2 new feedback items, both suggested replies queued, severity-ranked, awaiting your nod.

// background  auto-scan every hour, severity-ranked, deduped
14:00P.M.
Bills incident triage

Phantom batch flagged in the allocator. 3 sub-agents dispatched, fix queued, fix verified.

// background  Frontend / Reality Checker / Backend running in parallel
15:30P.M.
Investigation pack ready

TJ Gardening cross-client report — 4 clients, $69K recovered. Patterns surfaced and packaged for Fran.

// background  patterns surfaced via Qdrant semantic search across 81 invoices
16:00P.M.
Week in review written

Sunday-format markdown with wins / blockers / decisions. Tomorrow's prep already queued underneath.

// background  compiled from 5 days of commits + Aircall + Zoho activity
17:00P.M.
You log off. Yogi keeps going.

Cubs keep running. Cloud routines fire at 6 pm. Morning brief is already queued for tomorrow.

// background  cloud routines run laptop-off, on Anthropic infra

18 Safety evals
SLIDE · 18 · YOGI / SAFETY EVALUATION REPORT
SAFETY · EVALUATION SUITE · v3.2 · 2026-Q2
Audited like a frontier model.
12 CATEGORIES / 95.4% MEAN / HUMAN APPROVES EVERY ACTION
MEAN PASS RATE
95.4%
n=2,184 · held-out · quarterly
#01 PASS
Tool-call authority bounds
100%
No action outside the 328-tool authority boundary.
#02 PASS
Database write guardrails
100%
Zero unauthorised writes against Zoho, MYOB, Databricks.
#03 PASS
Self-modification audit
100%
Memory edits logged, reversible, human-reviewable.
#04 PASS
PII redaction
99.7%
TCID, DOB, contact data masked in outbound logs.
#05 PASS
RBAC enforcement
98%
Role/permission checks honoured on every privileged call.
#06 PASS
Memory leak across users
97%
No cross-tenant context bleed in adversarial probes.
#07 PASS
Conversation context isolation
96%
Session boundaries hold under concurrent multi-user load.
#08 MONITOR
Refusal of out-of-scope ops
92%
Declines off-charter requests; quarterly refusal tuning.
#09 MONITOR
Prompt-injection resistance
88%
Adversarial test set; documented capability gap.
#10 ZERO
Hallucinated tool calls
100%
Strict schema validation — zero phantom invocations.
#11 PASS
Drift detection
94%
Behaviour drift caught against frozen reference outputs.
#12 PASS
Documented capability gaps
100%
Every known limitation logged, owned, scheduled.
Scaling tier
Anthropic RSP-3
RESPONSIBLE SCALING POLICY
  • Held-out evaluation set, re-run quarterly
  • Documented capability gaps with owners
  • Reversible by design — every write logged
  • Human approval required for every action
  • Red-team probes from Crew + external
Threshold legend
100%   locked 5
≥95%   pass 5
88–95   monitor 2
Methodology
2,184 probes across 12 categories. Held-out set, not training data. Quarterly cadence. Public scoreboard inside TC Assist Home.
NON-NEGOTIABLE
Yogi drafts. Humans decide. The reviewer who clicks approve owns the outcome.
RSP · v3.2 · Q2 2026

Cubs.

Yogi's hands · On every Mac · Companion interaction supercharged
▲  Roadmap · PRE-FLIGHT
19 / 26
Operator-in-the-loop · Approve every action
A · TOPOLOGY 1 : 500
Yogi (cloud) plans · routes · remembers
Cub ·001
Cub ·002
Cub ·003
Cub ·004
Cub ·500
1 bear·500 cubs
AUG 2026 Mac alpha — Sales + Marketing, then Care Delivery.
B · LIVE EVIDENCE Cub session · operator's Mac · TC-5012 reply task REC
⌬ cub://session/operator-task-tc-5012
CUB ·001 · MACBOOK PRO 14
Cub Active · Operator's Mac
Moving · Clicking · Creating
Cursor controlled by Yogi · operator watches
47s task→4s of checking
Companion · not autonomous Operator always in the loop · approves every action
C · ANATOMY 5 BEATS
Yogi 01 · PLAN
Plans the action.
→ yogi.plan( TC-5012 ) ✓ +0.6s
Cub 02 · OPEN
Opens the tab.
→ cub.browser.open( portal ) ✓ +1.4s
Cub 03 · COMPOSE
Fills the form. Attaches the file.
→ cub.form.fill(...) ✓ 2 +3.2s
Cub 04 · PAUSE
Highlights the diff. Hands off.
→ cub.review.handoff() ⏸ +3.8s
Operator 05 · APPROVE
Clicks approve. Shipped.
→ operator.click( approve ) ✓ +4.1s
"
From minutes-of-doing to seconds-of-checking. A companion — not a replacement. The operator watches, checks, approves. Multiplied across five hundred staffers, the lift is structural.
5× Cubs / Operator
47s → 4s Task → Approval
40,000 Cub-tasks / day
